memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Eleanor Beaufort (1431-1501)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Lady Eleanor Beaufort (1431 – 16 August 1501) was the daughter of Edmund Beaufort, 2nd Duke of Somerset (1406-1455), KG, and was a sister of the 3rd and 4th Dukes of Somerset.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Beaufort於1431年出生時，她的父親Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset25歲，母親Eleanor Beauchamp23歲。她於大約1458年與James Butler 5th Earl of Ormond結婚。她去世於1501年8月16日在英國戴文享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Beaufort于1431年出生时，她的父亲Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset25岁，母亲Eleanor Beauchamp23岁。她于大约1458年与James Butler 5th Earl of Ormond结婚。她去世于1501年8月16日在英国戴文享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beaufort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English (originally French)   Beaufort  . It is found mainly among African Americans. Compare   Bluford  .

variants.name: Bluford
meanings: Possibly also English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place. The name occurs in records of the 19th century but is now extinct in the British Isles.
Variant of   Blueford  , a surname of English (ultimately French) origin. It is found mainly among African Americans.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Beaufort was born in 1431, her father, Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset, was 25 and her mother, Eleanor Beauchamp, was 23. She married James Butler 5th Earl of Ormond about 1458. She died on 16 August 1501, in Devon, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Beaufort est née en 1431, son père, Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Beauchamp, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé James Butler 5th Earl of Ormond environ 1458. Elle est décédée le 16 août 1501, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Beaufort 1431 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset 25 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Beauchamp 23. Sie hat um 1458 James Butler 5th Earl of Ormond geheiratet. Sie starb am 16. August 1501 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Beaufort è nata il nel 1431, sua padre, Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Beauchamp, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato James Butler 5th Earl of Ormond circa 1458. Morì il 16 agosto 1501, nel Devon, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Beaufortが1431年に生まれた時，父Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somersetは25歳，母Eleanor Beauchampは23歳であった。約1458年にJames Butler 5th Earl of Ormondと結婚した。彼女は1501年8月16日にイギリスデボンで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Beaufort(이)가 1431년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Beauchamp(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1458년 James Butler 5th Earl of Ormond(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1501년 8월 16일 영국 데폰에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ludgate, London, England: Ludgate, London, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Beaufort nasceu em 1431, seu pai, Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Beauchamp, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com James Butler 5th Earl of Ormond aproximadamente 1458. Ela faleceu em 16 de agosto de 1501, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Beaufort родилась в 1431 г., её отцу по имени Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Beauchamp, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Butler 5th Earl of Ormond около 1458 г. Она умерла 16 августа 1501 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Beaufort nació en 1431, su papá, Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Eleanor Beauchamp, tenía 23 años. Se casó con James Butler 5th Earl of Ormond aproximadamente 1458. Murió el 16 de agosto de 1501, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
